title: heliophila pinnata
intro: Heliophila pinnata, also known as the sunflower-crab, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. Heliophila pinnata can be prepared as a herbal remedy in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
